case_title: GILDARDO OJEDA TORRES VS. ORACLE RACING INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRES, GILDARDO OJEDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORACLE RACING INC. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED OCT-30-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ORACLE RACING INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ORACLE RACING INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TORRES, GILDARDO OJEDA AS TO DEFENDANT ORACLE RACING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, GILDARDO OJEDA AS TO DEFENDANT ORACLE RACING INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRIS SITZENSTOCK--PROJECT MANAGER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER-- PETER LEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
